concept: I'd appreciate a turn-based game where I command a team of specialized thieves pulling off elaborate heists in procedurally generated buildings. Each team member has unique abilities - the hacker controls security systems, the acrobat reaches otherwise inaccessible areas, the disguise artist creates distractions, and so forth. Security measures adapt to my tactics over successive heists, requiring constant innovation and new approaches. The narrative reveals that my team is actually recovering stolen artifacts for their rightful owners, working against a powerful corporation that has monopolized historical treasures.
